prompt:
PR #15 has merge conflicts after PRs #17 (Radarr) and #16 (Prowlarr) were merged into main. Rebase this branch onto main and resolve all conflicts.

The conflicts will be in files that all three PRs modified:
- internal/agent/agent.go — Agent struct now has `sonarr`, `radarr`, and `prowlarr` fields. Add `overseerr` alongside them. Update constructors (New, NewWithClient) to accept all four clients. The system prompt now mentions Sonarr, Radarr, and Prowlarr — add Overseerr capabilities too. The dispatchTool switch has cases for sonarr, radarr, and prowlarr tools — add overseerr cases with nil guards (check `a.overseerr == nil`).
- internal/agent/tools.go — Now has `sonarrToolDefs()` and `prowlarrToolDefs()` helper functions combined via `allToolDefs()`. Add `overseerrToolDefs()` and include it in `allToolDefs()`. The destructiveTools map includes radarr entries — add overseerr destructive tools too.
- internal/agent/agent_test.go — Has mockSonarr, mockRadarr, mockProwlarr. Add mockOverseerr. Update all test Agent struct literals to include the overseerr field.
- internal/config/config.go — Config struct has Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr configs. Add Overseerr.
- cmd/reel-life/main.go — Has sonarr, radarr, prowlarr client init. Add overseerr. Update agent.New() call to pass all four clients.

Run `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` to verify everything compiles and passes.
